body.title: WorkflowB: evaluate-claim reasoning workflow
body.result: WorkflowB_EvaluateClaim: verdict + confidence extraction. ClaimEvaluation output struct. 8 tests.
body.description: WorkflowB_EvaluateClaim — peer conversation to evaluate whether a claim/memory still holds. Same pattern as WorkflowA. Opening: state the claim + evidence. Workflow steps: probe for counter-evidence, check recency, assess confidence. Output: ClaimEvaluation(claim, verdict, confidence, counter_evidence). Sub-ticket of #436.
